bug: Lead missing-item delete hits Supabase 400/23502 because leads.next_action_title becomes null.
ContextActionDialogs saves do not refresh LeadDetail/ClientDetail immediately.
fix: Lead/client missing item delete is soft-delete via updateTaskInSupabase status=deleted.
LeadDetail and ClientDetail listen for closeflow:context-action-saved and reload.
CaseDetail listener already exists and is guarded.
riskAudit: Soft-deleted task remains in DB but is hidden by deleted done-status filter.
If next_action_title error persists, next stage must inspect backend lead next-action sync/trigger.
